message:
Use .build/ instead of /tmp/ for compilation artifacts

- Industry standard: use project-local build directory
- Added .build/ to .gitignore
- Updated both compileZig and compileZigSharedLib functions
- Added comptime_helpers.zig to copied runtime files

Benefits:
- No system pollution
- Easy cleanup with make clean
- Reproducible builds
- No permission issues

files.patch:
@@ -69,6 +69,7 @@ _prototype/
 *.before_fix
 .venv/
 .pyaot/
+.build/
 
 .claude/
 CLAUDE.md
